name: shared-skills
description: A bundle of shared Agent Skills that can run in Claude Code and Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Cross-compatible skills for Claude Code and Codex.
interface.longDescription: Install this bundle to use shared Agent Skills in OpenAI Codex. The same SKILL.md folders are also packaged for Claude Code.
defaultPrompt: Use the marketplace-maintainer skill to add a new skill to this marketplace.
Use the trace-value-debugging skill to debug a runtime value mismatch with bounded traces.
Use the surface-churn skill to identify why a task is generating repeated rework.
